global.description: The ad features a promotional offer for a food delivery service with a modern design.
global.main_message: Promoting a 2-for-1 food offer with a clear call to action.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: QuickFork logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'QuickFork' in a modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: SALE badge
elements.description: A small, circular badge with the text 'SALE' in bold, eye-catching typography, located at the top right corner.

elements.label: Graphic elements
elements.description: Three stylized rectangles representing food items, arranged horizontally in the center of the ad.

elements.label: 2-for-1 offer text
elements.description: Bold text stating '2-for-1 tonight' in a large font, centered in the middle of the ad.

elements.label: Fresh favorites text
elements.description: Smaller text below the main offer, reading 'Fresh favorites nearby' in a clean, readable font.

elements.label: Price text
elements.description: A prominent price tag displaying '$4.99' in a large, bold font at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A button with the text 'Claim reward' in a contrasting color, positioned below the price text.

elements.label: UGC icon
elements.description: A small icon labeled 'UGC' in the top left corner, indicating user-generated content.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: An unspecified element that does not have a clear visual representation in the ad.

elements.label: Unknown element
elements.description: An unspecified element that does not have a clear visual representation in the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, banner, dark and modern, 2-for-1 offer, QuickFork logo
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, the main offer is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: QuickFork, SALE, 2-for-1 tonight, Fresh favorites nearby, $4.99, Claim reward, UGC
